title: Navigation History, Immutable Snapshots, Back, and Bounded Undo · Contract Lens: Pokedex Ts History Transaction
summary: History stores mutable references, pushes attempts before success, back triggers new hidden network work, unlimited pages accumulate, and undo can resurrect a stale pending request. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts history transaction increment in bounded immutable navigation timeline. Learners progress through prediction,…
objectives: Push only after success, restore without hidden traffic when promised, and cancel or supersede pending operations safely.
Store readonly copied domain snapshots or stable cache identities without shared mutable arrays or pending controllers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
